2351660.name: Mindbug Online
2351660.description:
Unique Card Battler

Mindbug takes the excitement of strategy card games and distills it into the most streamlined, skill-based dueling experience in the multiverse. Quick to pick up, endlessly strategic, and fair to all players. There’s no endless deck-construction, no random booster packs, and no complicated rules to memorize. Every decision matters, and every match feels fresh and unpredictable.

Experience Meets Innovation

Co-designed by Richard Garfield (Creator of Magic: The Gathering), Mindbug combines decades of TCG expertise with a groundbreaking, original game mechanic. The Mindbugs allow you to steal your opponent’s creature play twice per game — creating tense, mind-bending duels that reward strategy, timing, and skill.

Crazy Card Abilities

Mindbug is simple to learn but deep to master. Every card is powerful in the right situation, and every play can turn the game on its head. You’ll find yourself making meaningful choices from turn to turn, balancing risk, bluffing, and clever combos. The game is short, but each decision is super impactful.

Fast and Intense Matches

Play a complete game in under 5 minutes. Mindbug delivers rapid-fire duels that are easy to teach, fast to set up, and endlessly replayable. Perfect for a quick match with friends, a competitive showdown, or just a few minutes of strategic fun.

Infinite Strategies

Even though Mindbug is extremely easy to learn, the game will keep surprising you with new and exciting challenges and combos. The unique Mindbug mechanic allows you to control your opponents’ creatures and leads to unique decision-making that requires even veteran card game players to adjust their traditional playstyle.

What are you waiting for earthling? Show your incredible skill and turn your opponents’ strongest creatures into your own advantage! Play Mindbug Online Now!
2351660.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 意大利语, 简体中文, 波兰语, 捷克语, 日语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
